description_long: This object is a modern, streamlined train carriage with a predominantly metallic exterior and a long, rectangular body. The train features a raised cab or operator's compartment at one end, equipped with a large, angled windshield and a visible headlight. Along the length of the carriage, there are several small, dark-tinted windows and a few access panels or doors, with some technical equipment mounted on the roof. The undercarriage includes visible wheels and suspension components, and the lower edge is accented with a yellow safety stripe. The overall design suggests a focus on urban or commuter rail service, with robust construction and minimal decorative elements. The train's surfaces are smooth and hard, with a matte to slightly glossy finish.
description: A modern, metallic urban train carriage with a raised cab, small windows, and technical roof equipment. It features a long, rectangular body with a yellow safety stripe and visible undercarriage components.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the raised cab with windshield and headlight, highlighting the train's narrow profile.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the carriage, small windows, roof equipment, and yellow safety stripe.
description_view_2: Opposite end view focusing on the rear of the train, with technical details and minimal window visibility.
description_view_3: Alternate side view showing the undercarriage, access panels, and the arrangement of windows and roof features.
